title: Progress Bar breakdown + mirrors

posts.author: mitchellgp (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be super useful to be able to interact with the progress bar and once clicked, it’ll show a pop up of the statuses being used, and from that pop up, change those statuses.

The functionality of being able to also use mirror columns would be amazing too! I’ve had to create a few janky work arounds because of this limitation.
